programme.title: The Gun and the Pulpit
programme.desc: After narrowly escaping a lynch mob atheist gunslinger Ernie Parsons Marjoe Gortner steals the identity of a murdered preacher and takes his job in a western town Ernie falls for the beautiful Sally Underwood Pamela Sue Martin and becomes attached to the town hes come to think of as his sanctuary So when his new home is threatened by a tyrannical land baron Ernie must use both his extensive skills as a gunfighter and his minimal skills as a preacher to defend the townspeople

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: Grape Ape
programme.desc: Grape Ape

programme.title: Hong 103
programme.desc: Hong 103

programme.title: Inspector Gadget
programme.desc: Inspector Gadget

programme.title: Hair Bear Bunch
programme.desc: While auditioning for the parts of the three bears in Goldilocks and the Three Bears Peevly catches up with them

programme.title: The Bullwinkle
programme.desc: Rocky Bullwinkle Jet Fuel Part 39 Fractured Fairy Tales King Midas Peabodys Improbably History Stanley Livingstone Rocky Bullwinkle Jet Fuel Part 40

programme.title: The Bullwinkle
programme.desc: Rocky Bullwinkle Box Top Robery Part 1 Fractured Fairy Tales Hansel and Gretel Peabodys Improbably History Louis Pasteur Rocky Bullwinkle Box Top Robery Part 2

programme.title: Hydroplane Racing
programme.desc: Hydroplane Racing

programme.title: Hydroplane Racing
programme.desc: Hydroplane Racing

programme.title: Pearl Harbor
programme.desc: Pearl Harbor

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: Springtime in the Rockies
programme.desc: Broadway partners Vicky Lane and Dan Christy have a tiff over Christys womanizing Jealous Vicky takes up with her old flame and former dance partner Victor Price and Dans career takes a nosedive In hopes of rekindling their romance and getting Vicky back on the boards with him Dan follows her to a ritzy resort in the Canadian Rockies where she and Victor are about to open their new act But things get complicated when Dan wakes after a bender to find that hes hired an outlandish Latin secretary Rosita Murphy which makes Vicky think hes just up to his old tricks again

programme.title: Lights of Old Sante Fe
programme.desc: In this musical western Marjorie Brooks Dale Evans is the owner and operator of a rodeo thats an antiquated touring company on its last legs Her business rival Frank Madden Richard Powers offers to combine their operations if the lovely Marjorie will be his bride Though she initially rebuffs his proposal a canceled booking tips the scales and forces Marjorie to accept But rodeo rider Roy Rogers Roy Rogers suspects Frank is behind Marjories troubles and sets out to investigate

programme.title: Colorado
programme.desc: Trouble in Colorado is tying up Union troops needed back east during the Civil War and Lieut Burke is sent to investigate Macklin and his gang are causing the problems and Capt Mason joins them When Burke catches up with them he also finds Mason his brother

programme.title: This Man Cant Die
programme.desc: An adventurer vows revenge after he returns home to find his parents murdered and his sister traumatised by the killer

programme.title: Sheriff of Tombstone
programme.desc:
Roy Rogers and George Gabby Hayes in Sheriff of Tombstone 1941
The mayor has sent for a gunslinger who though appearing to clean up the town is really to be the mayors means of taking the town over When Roy and Gabby arrive in Tombstone Roy is mistaken for the gunslinger Just as Roy is ready to expose the mayor the real gunslinger shows up

programme.title: Bells of San Angelo
programme.desc: Bells of San Angelo

programme.title: Captain N The Game Master
programme.desc: After playing a riddle game Captain N Princess Lana and Simon get a call from Mayor Squaresly that Tetris is in trouble so they go and check it out while the Puzzle King plans to rule Tetris

programme.title: Forever Knight
programme.desc: Nick investigates the murder of a sleazy journalist who was in the process of blackmailing a mayoral candidate

programme.title: Friday the 13th The Series
programme.desc: Micki and Ryan race to find an old World Series ring that enables its owner to see gambling results before they happen

programme.title: The Horror at 37000 Feet
programme.desc: An invisible demon in the cargo hold of a jet airliner terrorizes the passengers

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: Freddys Nightmares
programme.desc: Freddy goes after a Springwood teenager whos stuck working at a burger joint owned by his father

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: A psychic clown and part-time cook who abuses his assistant and wife learns that she is having an affair with a fire eater and plans to runs off with him

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: A hot-tempered convict with a butter addiction tries to get revenge with the help of his mentally challenged brother on the ice cream trucker who was responsible for his arrest unaware the driver also has a dark secret too

programme.title: The Hitchhiker
programme.desc: Married Todd Fields teaches a high school photography class in a small quiet country town but aspires to work in a big city and gets led astray when he falls under the seductive spell of attractive new student Roseanne Lucas

programme.title: The Hitchhiker
programme.desc: Lew Bridgeman and Joe Caldwell are two longtime best friends who served together in the Vietnam War Lew and Joe wind clashing with each other over Lews fetching wife Rae whom both men are in love with

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: In a run down hotel in a town where a slasher has killed 7 people Eric checks in after inquiring about Skorzeny He meets several people staying at the hotel including a man in black who reveals that he is also werewolf born in 1468

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: Eric teams up with an elderly homeless man who is also a werewolf in an effort to defeat Remy But discovers that the Gray Wolf hungers for human flesh

programme.title: Forever Knight
programme.desc: Nick and Schanke have to protect a rock n roll star whose life is threatened

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Mister Ed is stolen and hidden in a sorority house basement Its Wilbur dressed in drag to the rescue

programme.title: Hogans Heroes
programme.desc: There seems to be a traitor in the escaped prisoner pipeline and Hogan has to find him by following the escape route

programme.title: Hogans Heroes
programme.desc: Carter receives a Dear John letter and wants to join the rest of the prisoners that escape and go home

programme.title: McHales Navy
programme.desc: Binghamton devises a deceitful plan to have McHale chosen for the position of Liaison Officer at British Fleet HQ in Australia Parker and The Crew unwittingly help McHale to get the job then must scheme to get him off the hook when they find out that they wont be going along

programme.title: McHales Navy
programme.desc: With McHale and his Crew presumably killed in action publicity-hungry Binghamton plays the part of the grieving Commanding Officer when a War Correspondent comes to Taratupa looking for a big story But when McHale and the Crew turn up very much alive and well Binghamton must cooperate with McHale to work up a cover story

programme.title: Gomer Pyle USMC
programme.desc: Carter and an old war buddy credit each other for being war heroes

programme.title: Gomer Pyle USMC
programme.desc: Gomer decides to find a girl of his own after meeting Sergeant Carters girlfriend

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: A mad scientist invites the castaways to his island where he hopes to conduct strange experiments on them

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: The Howells discover that they are not legally married But as The Skipper prepares to marry them in the lagoon a fight causes them to call off the wedding altogether

programme.title: Real McCoys S04E29
programme.desc: Real McCoys S04E29

programme.desc: Real McCoys S04E14

programme.title: Get Smart
programme.desc: Get Smart

programme.title: Get Smart
programme.desc: Get Smart

programme.title: BJ and the Bear
programme.desc: Captain Grant and Trans Cal Truckings new strongman Cooley conspire to put Bear Enterprises out of business aided and abetted by a stranger with a secret

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: The new kid on the block is having trouble fitting in so Mister Ed comes up with a plan to help him win friends

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: The Police Connection
programme.desc: When a “mad bomber” THE RIFLEMAN himself Chuck Connors – as the police computer classifies his suspect type – blows up a high school and a hospital Lieutenant Geronimo Minneli Vince Edwards TV’s BEN CASEY is on his trail He may have a witness in a young mute woman who was raped at the hospital just before the explosion but she is too ashamed to identify her attacker In any case Minneli reasons that it is unlikely that the bomber would stop to rape a woman after planting the bomb and that the rapist and the bomber are likely different people; therefore the rapist himself might be the only one who can help the police catch him Since the police do not know the bomber’s modus operandi but they do know the rapists Minneli starts questioning his past victims

programme.title: The Bullwinkle
programme.desc: The Bullwinkle

programme.title: The Bullwinkle
programme.desc: The Bullwinkle

programme.title: The Herculoids
programme.desc: The Herculoids

programme.desc: The Herculoids

programme.title: Inspector Gadget
programme.desc: Towering Towers Game Over Man Game

programme.title: Inspector Gadget
programme.desc: Gadget Penny and Brain are warned that MAD plan to steal rare pieces of art from the Modern Art Museum in New York and replace them with fakes

programme.title: Morning Departure
programme.desc: Trouble arises when 12 men realize that only eight of them can escape from the sinking submarine that has collided with a mine left over from the war

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: Space 1999
programme.desc: The Alphans encounter the Voyager space probe that has been wandering the cosmos propelled by the Queller drive- a faulty engine system Following the probe is a fleet of alien ships from a world devastated by the drive

programme.title: Cyber Tracker
programme.desc: This is the future A secret service agent is framed by his own and becomes the target of the seemingly indestructible Cyborg-Executioners

programme.title: Highlander II The Quickening
programme.desc: In this sci-fifantasy sequel Connor MacLeod Christopher Lambert has become an elderly man after losing his immortality Living in a bleak future where the world is protected from solar radiation by a massive shield MacLeod regains his youth when he kills two assassins from his home planet This results in an ongoing battle with the villainous and powerful Gen Katana Michael Ironside but MacLeod receives help when the noble Juan Ramirez Sean Connery returns

programme.title: The Dukes of Hazzard
programme.desc: Bo and Luke are skinny-dipping in a local pond when two pool hustlers steal both the cousins clothing and the General Lee Rosco soon pursues who he thinks are the Duke boys but the crooks drive the stolen General Lee into the lake When nobody is found with the car Rosco tearfully announces that Bo and Luke have drowned Bo and Luke arrive home safe and sound then learn that Boss has used their alleged deaths to implicate them on the theft of his gold watch so he can fraudulently collect the insurance money The Duke boys and Cooter concoct a scheme to turn the General Lee into a ghost and haunt Boss and Rosco until they admit their scheme

programme.title: Hercules 208
programme.desc: Hercules 208

programme.title: Earth Final Conflict
programme.desc: Earth Final Conflict

programme.title: War of the Worlds
programme.desc: The alien embryo created on the Breeding Groundepisode has now grown and is now a pre-adolescent in human terms named Adam residing in a special school occupied by human children with exceptional IQs secretly run by the Morthren The aliens have nefarious plans for the children

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: Swamp Thing gifts the chance to make things right to three criminals who break out of Houma Prison

programme.title: The Fugitive
programme.desc: Kimble works as a laundryman for an amiable fellow named Charlie who knows too much about the wrong people who are out to kill him He has arranged for his girlfriend to come join him not realizing she may bring the Mob with her

programme.title: The Fugitive
programme.desc: After being mugged by four hoodlums Kimble is reluctant to deal with the police But while leaving town he ends up getting handcuffed to a policewoman When she breaks her ankle Kimble has to help her while evading the police manhunt

programme.title: Big Valley
programme.desc: While returning to Stockton Victoria and Jarrod stop in a town with outrageous prices for food lodging and services After finding out the people are bilking travelers to survive the Barkleys decide to open a shipping business to save the town-despite opposition from a territorial boss with a rival freight company in the area

programme.title: Cheyenne
programme.desc: After a close friend of Cheyenne is killed during the escape of bank robbers Cheyenne and Smitty track the band of outlaws across the border to a small Mexican village The band has taken over the town after killing 14 young men there

programme.title: Young 322
programme.desc: Young 322

programme.title: Lonesome Dove Outlaw Years
programme.desc: Lonesome Dove Outlaw Years

programme.title: The Streets of San Francisco
programme.desc: Two very different victims are murdered one a very rich foreign businessman found knifed; the other a poor black police informant found shot in a phone booth Meanwhile a Japanese industrialist is also found dead

programme.title: Mission Impossible
programme.desc: The Impossible Missions Force takes on the absolute ruler of a Middle East nation who is running a secret slave market Barney poses as a slave part of an effort to construct a replica of the slave cells before escaping Phelps poses as a slave trader and Rollin as an Interpol investigator Finally Cinnamon will be the bait for the trap The ruler of the country has a brother who married a British wife Amara The brother if he assumed power would abolish slavery in the country -- but he has accepted assurances that slavery doesnt exist there As part of the plan Willy abducts Amara and she is put in the IMF replica of the slave cell

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: Friday becomes emotionally involved in a rape-murder case of a Japanese-American war widow especially after he sees how beautiful she was and after he finds out that she left a young daughter behind Also there might be a connection with the rape of another woman the previous night Now Friday and Gannon must search for the rapist before he strikes again

programme.title: Business Network TV
programme.desc: The Defining Path Your Purpose, Your Passion, Your Life Staff Sgt Aaron Hale Finds Love and Fudge"

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Professional and Amateur fighters from across North America battle it out in Hard Knocks' cage. Mike Goehr v. Barrett Thompson.

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Trenton Rowell trains out of two different gyms in his small town, perfecting his ground game at one and working his striking at the other. He loves MMA, and is always looking for new ways to grow his skills regardless of his results. Trenton epitomizes Process over Outcome in his training, as he never focuses on the title, but rather simply trying to be in the best shape possible while balancing work, MMA and family life.

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Chris Kaminesky v. Damien DiMarco - HKF

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: It is Striker vs. Grappler! At Hard Knocks 50, John Woo and Jordan Van Heek fight an impressive short round. This episode of Out of the Cage focuses on John Woo and his path to his amateur debut fight.

programme.title: Captain N The Game Master
programme.desc: Dragon Lord and Mother Brain try to turn every dragon evil The N team rescues Puff a white last good dragon baby

programme.title: Dungeons Dragons
programme.desc: The adventurers meet a girl from their world who has accurate dreams of the future

programme.title: Dungeons Dragons
programme.desc: The Realm is being destroyed by a horrible Demo-Dragon The only weapon that can stop it is the Treasure of Tardos but even if they get it the team will need a most unlikely ally

programme.title: Inspector Gadget
programme.desc: Dr Claw has invented a spray that rots wood instantly If he is not paid one million dollars he will destroy every forest in the world Inspector gadget destroys the invention

programme.title: Inspector Gadget
programme.desc: Dr Claw plans to use a flock of trained birds to steal a precious jewel

programme.title: Challenge of the GoBots
programme.desc: Steamer defects to the Guardians but theyre suspicious when he reveals Cy-Kills new scheme to overthrow Earth

programme.title: Challenge of the GoBots
programme.desc: The Renegades discredit Scooter so that no one believes him when he realizes Cy-Kill is planning a new mission

programme.desc: The Herculoids

programme.desc: The Herculoids

programme.title: Jayce and The Wheeled Warriors
programme.desc: Neetra manages to get a message out regarding her planet Tekka Monster Minds are about to attack to acquire their powerful fuel miran to power his missiles The Vertim and Batim colonies rival each other for control of the pyramid made of miran

programme.title: Jayce and The Wheeled Warriors
programme.desc: Lost and dangerously low on fuel the Lightning League searches for Gate World a legendary gateway to any spot in the universe Gillian adapts the scanner and the Pride lands in the centre of some stonework on a beautiful planet

programme.title: MASK
programme.desc: Bruce Sato encounters a man suffering from a fever in the Alaskan snow and is soon infected with the same mysterious disease Matt assembles MASK to find the cure

programme.title: MASK
programme.desc: Professor Hillary is about to decipher ancient Egyptian hieroglyphs that lead to the Golden Scarab with the secret to life itself But a mummy Sly Rax in disguise steals the hieroglyph tablet during the night
